phrases.intent_en: Ask where the takeaway bag station is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estação de sacos para viagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DIH SAH-koosh PUH-ruh VEEAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: Takeaway supplies are conveniently placed near the receipt station to streamline packing.

phrases.text_local: Recomenda um restaurante autêntico por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: reh-koo-MAYNG-duh OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih ow-TAYNG-tee-koo POOR uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao empregado de balcão sobre opções autênticas nas redondezas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH bahl-KOWN SOHB-rih awp-SOHNYSH ow-TAYNG-tee-kuhsh NUHSH reh-doong-DEH-zuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the counter staff about authentic options nearby.

responses.english: Ask the counter staff about authentic options nearby.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH bahl-KOWN SOHB-rih awp-SOHNYSH ow-TAYNG-tee-kuhsh NUHSH reh-doong-DEH-zuhsh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao empregado de balcão sobre opções autênticas nas redondezas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the takeaway bag station is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estação de sacos takeaway?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DIH SAH-koosh tuh-keeuh-WEYE?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese pastry shops, takeaway bags are typically available at the counter. Staff may point to the area near the register.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's at the counter.

responses.english: Good morning, it's at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Bolo de Chá is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Bolo de Chá?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW BOH-loo DIH SHAH?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional sponge cakes are typically displayed in the main glass case near the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the coffee order window is
phrases.text_local: Onde é o balcão para pedir café?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AW bahl-KOWN PUH-ruh pih-DEER kuh-FEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Coffee orders use a dedicated side window to separate drink queues from pastry purchases.

likely_response.local: Junto à vitrine dos pastéis, à esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: ZHOONNG-too AH veet-REE-nih DOOSH puhsh-TEHEESH, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can order at the coffee counter.

responses.english: You can order at the coffee counter.
responses.phonetic: ZHOONNG-too AH veet-REE-nih DOOSH puhsh-TEHEESH, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.french: Junto à vitrine dos pastéis, à esquerda.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o local para pegar as sacolas de takeaway?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW loo-KAHL PUH-ruh pih-GAHR UHSH suh-KOH-luhsh DIH tuh-keeuh-WEYE?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Queijadas de Leite are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as Queijadas de Leite?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH kay-ZHAH-duhsh DIH LAY-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Milk custard tarts are usually arranged centrally for quick service and visibility.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar Pão de Ló?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR POWN DIH LAW?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Pastel de Nata is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde estão os Pastéis de Nata?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH puhsh-TEHEESH DIH NAH-tuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Pastéis de Nata are usually displayed prominently at the glass pastry counter in Portuguese pastelarias.

likely_response.local: No balcão de vidro, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH VEED-roo, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the glass counter, on the right.

responses.english: At the glass counter, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH VEED-roo, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: No balcão de vidro, à direita.
